title: Red Hat Security Advisory: zziplib security update
overview:
An update for zziplib is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux CodeReady Linux Builder (v. 10)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: zziplib security update

An update for zziplib is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for zziplib is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
zziplib-0.13.78-2.el10.src.rpm
zziplib-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-debugsource-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-utils-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-utils-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm
zziplib-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm
zziplib-debugsource-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm
zziplib-utils-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm
zziplib-utils-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm
zziplib-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-debugsource-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-utils-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-utils-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-debugsource-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-utils-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-utils-debuginfo-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-devel-0.13.78-2.el10.x86_64.rpm
zziplib-devel-0.13.78-2.el10.ppc64le.rpm
zziplib-devel-0.13.78-2.el10.aarch64.rpm
zziplib-devel-0.13.78-2.el10.s390x.rpm

CVE-2018-17828: It was discovered that zziplib is vulnerable to a directory traversal flaw in most of its unzip binaries, including unzip-mem, unzzipcat-mem, unzzipcat-big, unzzipcat-mix, and unzzipcat-zip. An attacker may use this flaw to write files outside the intended target directory, overwriting existing files, or creating new ones.
